response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack and backend engineer with ~17 years of experience, but his profile is fundamentally misaligned with this role. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis side project, far short of the 5–10 years required. There is no evidence of Windows platform development, no SQL Server or Oracle usage, and no fixed-income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge. His career has been built almost entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web, SaaS, and embedded/GIS systems.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated across multiple roles
Experience at RIDE Capital shows some exposure to financial-services product context (investment practices platform)
Active communicator with public talks and workshops, satisfying the verbal/written communication requirement
concerns: C++ experience is negligible — approximately 6 months professionally (~2014) with no subsequent usage, nowhere near the 5–10 year requirement
No Windows platform development evident; career stack is Linux/cloud-native with no mention of Windows-based systems
Zero fixed-income, fixed-income derivatives, or capital markets domain expertise; financial exposure is limited to a generic German investment-practices startup
